text: allow specifying a worktree for a loop

status.comment: Implemented and internally verified; awaiting user acceptance.

reflection: Added optional validated worktree path to loop configuration. Graph orientation, target/status updates, and reflections remain anchored to the open project's .bowman, while file, Git, command, patch, and code-intelligence tools operate in the configured worktree. Verified agent-tools and loop-worker typechecks, backend build, frontend production build, diff check, and all 58 backend tests.
